case refine_2.refine_2
α : Type u_1
R : Type u_2
mα : MeasurableSpace α
mR : MeasurableSpace R
inst✝⁶ : Nonempty α
inst✝⁵ : StandardBorelSpace α
inst✝⁴ : DecidableEq α
inst✝³ : Countable α
inst✝² : StandardBorelSpace R
inst✝¹ : Nonempty R
alg : Algorithm α R
ν : Kernel α R
inst✝ : IsMarkovKernel ν
n : ℕ
⊢ Measure.map
      (fun x =>
        ((@Bandits.ArrayModel.hist α R mα mR inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ alg x n,
            @Bandits.ArrayModel.action α R mα mR inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ alg (n + 1) x),
          x.2
            (pullCount (@Bandits.ArrayModel.action α R mα mR inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ alg)
              (@Bandits.ArrayModel.action α R mα mR inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ alg (n + 1) x) (n + 1) x)
            (@Bandits.ArrayModel.action α R mα mR inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ alg (n + 1) x)))
      (@Bandits.ArrayModel.arrayMeasure α R mα mR ν) =
    (Measure.map
          (fun ω =>
            (@Bandits.ArrayModel.hist α R mα mR inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ alg ω n,
              @Bandits.ArrayModel.action α R mα mR inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ alg (n + 1) ω))
          (@Bandits.ArrayModel.arrayMeasure α R mα mR ν)).compProd
      (Kernel.prodMkLeft (↥(Iic n) → α × R) ν)

rw [lintegral_compProd_range_preimage_singleton (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
  simp only [S, reward, action]
  rw [set_lintegral_congr_fun (h_meas_S k a) (g := fun ω ↦ ∫ r, f (hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω, r) ∂(ν a))]
  · let mask (ω : probSpace α R) : probSpace α R :=
      (ω.1, Function.update ω.2 k (Function.update (ω.2 k) a (Classical.choice inst✝¹)))
    have h_inv : ∀ ω ∈ S k a, hist alg ω n = hist alg (mask ω) n ∧
        action alg (n + 1) ω = action alg (n + 1) (mask ω) := by
      intro ω hω
      have h_hist : ∀ m ≤ n, hist alg ω m = hist alg (mask ω) m := by
        intro m hm; induction m with
        | zero => simp [hist_zero, mask]; rfl
        | succ m hm_ind =>
          specialize hm_ind (Nat.le_of_succ_le hm)
          rw [hist_add_one, hist_add_one (ω := mask ω)]
          simp only [hm_ind]
          have h_act : action alg (m + 1) ω = action alg (m + 1) (mask ω) := by
            rw [action_add_one_eq, action_add_one_eq, hm_ind]; rfl
          congr 1; funext i; split_ifs with hi
          · congr; exact (hist_eq _ _ _).trans (by simp; rw [← (hist_eq _ _ _)]; exact congr_fun hm_ind ⟨i, by omega⟩)
          · congr; rw [action, hist_eq]; dsimp; rw [← hist_eq, hm_ind]
            congr; rw [reward_eq, reward_eq]; dsimp
            rw [pullCount_eq_pullCount', pullCount_eq_pullCount']
            have h_neq : (pullCount' m (hist alg ω m) (action alg (m + 1) ω), action alg (m + 1) ω) ≠ (k, a) := by
              by_contra! h_eq
              have h_cnt : pullCount' n (hist alg ω n) (action alg (n + 1) ω) > k := by
                rw [← h_eq.1, ← h_eq.2, pullCount', pullCount']
                refine (Finset.card_lt_card (s := (Iic m).filter (fun i ↦ action alg i ω = a)) ?_).trans_le (by simp)
                rw [Finset.ssubset_iff_of_subset (Finset.monotone_filter_left _ (Iic_subset_Iic.mpr (Nat.le_of_succ_le hm)))]
                refine ⟨n, by simp, ?_⟩
                simp only [Finset.mem_filter, mem_Iic]
                refine ⟨le_refl n, ?_⟩
                rw [action, hist_eq]; dsimp; rw [← hist_eq, hm_ind]
                rw [action_add_one_eq] at h_eq
                rw [← h_eq.2, h_act]
              omega
            simp [mask, Function.update_apply, h_neq]
      exact ⟨h_hist n le_rfl, by rw [action_add_one_eq, action_add_one_eq, h_hist n le_rfl]⟩
    have h_S_inv : ∀ ω, ω ∈ S k a ↔ mask ω ∈ S k a := by
      intro ω
      simp only [S, mem_setOf_eq]
      by_cases h : ω ∈ S k a
      · rw [h_inv ω h] at h; simp [h]
      · by_contra h'; apply h; rw [h_inv _ h'] at h'; exact h'
    let g (ω : probSpace α R) := indicator (S k a) (fun ω ↦ f (hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω, ω.2 k a)) ω
    have hg : g = (fun ω ↦ indicator (S k a) (fun ω ↦ f (hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω, (mask ω).2 k a)) ω)
        * (fun ω ↦ if ω.2 k a = (mask ω).2 k a then 1 else ω.2 k a) := by
      ext ω; simp [g, indicator, mask]; split_ifs <;> simp
    -- We use a simpler independence argument:
    -- \int_S f(H, A, R) = \int (1_S f(H, A) \circ mask) * R
    rw [← lintegral_indicator _ (h_meas_S k a)]
    have : ∀ ω, indicator (S k a) (fun ω ↦ f (hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω, ω.2 k a)) ω =
        (fun ω ↦ indicator (S k a) (fun ω ↦ f (hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω, r)) ω) (Function.update ω 2 (Function.update (ω 2) k (Function.update (ω 2 k) a (ω.2 k a)))) := by
      intro ω; simp
    -- Using the independence of mask and ω.2 k a
    have h_indep : IndepFun mask (fun ω ↦ ω.2 k a) (arrayMeasure ν) := by
      have h_meas_mask : Measurable mask := by
        refine Measurable.prodMk (by fun_prop) (measurable_pi_iff.mpr fun i ↦ ?_)
        by_cases hi : i = k; · subst hi; simp [mask]; exact Measurable.pi_iff.mpr fun b ↦ by
            by_cases hb : b = a <;> simp [hb, mask] <;> fun_prop
        · simp [hi, mask]; fun_prop
      refine iIndepFun.indepFun_comp (iIndepFun_eval_streamMeasure (α := α) (R := R) ν) _ _ (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) ?_
      intro x hx; simp at hx; simp [mask]; exact hx
    let F (ω : probSpace α R) (r : R) := indicator (S k a) (fun ω ↦ f (hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω, r)) ω
    have h_eq : ∀ ω, indicator (S k a) (fun ω ↦ f (hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω, ω.2 k a)) ω = F (mask ω) (ω.2 k a) := by
      intro ω; simp [F, indicator]; split_ifs with h
      · rw [(h_inv ω h).1, (h_inv ω h).2]; simp [h_S_inv _ ▸ h]
      · have : mask ω ∉ S k a := mt (h_S_inv ω).mpr h
        simp [this]
    simp_rw [h_eq]
    rw [IndepFun.lintegral_comp h_indep (Measurable.aemeasurable (by fun_prop)) (Measurable.aemeasurable (by fun_prop))]
    simp only [integral_eval_streamMeasure, F, indicator, lintegral_const_mul]
    rw [lintegral_indicator _ (h_meas_S k a)]
    congr; ext ω
    by_cases h : ω ∈ S k a
    · simp only [h, if_true]; rw [(h_inv ω h).1, (h_inv ω h).2, h_S_inv _ ▸ h]; simp
    · simp only [h, if_false]; have : mask ω ∉ S k a := mt (h_S_inv ω).mpr h; simp [this]
  · intro ω hω; rfl

ext f hf
  rw [lintegral_map hf, lintegral_compProd hf]
  simp_rw [reward_eq]
  have h_sum : ∀ ω, f ((hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω),
      ω.2 (pullCount (action alg) (action alg (n + 1) ω) (n + 1) ω) (action alg (n + 1) ω)) =
      ∑' (a : α) (c : ℕ), (if action alg (n + 1) ω = a ∧
        pullCount (action alg) a (n + 1) ω = c then 1 else 0) *
        f ((hist alg ω n, a), ω.2 c a) := by
    intro ω
    rw [tsum_eq_single (action alg (n + 1) ω)]
    · rw [tsum_eq_single (pullCount (action alg) (action alg (n + 1) ω) (n + 1) ω)]
      · simp
      · intro c hc
        simp [hc]
      · infer_instance
    · intro a ha
      simp [ha]
      rw [tsum_zero]
      intro c; split_if <;> simp at *; contradiction
    · infer_instance
  simp_rw [h_sum, lintegral_tsum (by fun_prop)]
  congr! 1 with a
  congr! 1 with c
  rw [lintegral_ite (by fun_prop)]
  have h_indep : IndepFun (fun ω ↦ ω.2 c a) (fun ω ↦ (hist alg ω n,
      (if action alg (n + 1) ω = a ∧ pullCount (action alg) a (n + 1) ω = c
       then 1 else 0 : ℝ≥0∞))) (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    -- The random variable (hist, indicator) depends only on seeds and stream values at indices
    -- distinct from (c, a). The stream value at (c, a) is independent of those.
    sorry
  rw [lintegral_mul_eq_lintegral_mul_lintegral_of_indepFun'' h_indep (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
  rw [map_snd_apply_arrayMeasure, lintegral_map (by fun_prop)]
  simp only [lintegral_const, one_mul]
  rw [lintegral_ite (by fun_prop)]
  simp

f hf
  rw [lintegral_map hf (by fun_prop), Measure.compProd_lintegral _ _ hf,
    lintegral_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
  have h_sum : ∀ ω, f (hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω, reward alg (n + 1) ω) =
      ∑' (p : α × ℕ), if action alg (n + 1) ω = p.1 ∧ pullCount (action alg) p.1 (n + 1) ω = p.2
        then f (hist alg ω n, p.1, ω.2 p.2 p.1) else 0 := by

  simp_rw [h_sum, lintegral_tsum (fun _ ↦ by fun_prop)]
  congr 1; ext ⟨a, k⟩
  -- The term is \int 1_{A=a, N=k} * f(H, a, ω.2 k a) dμ
  -- The event {A=a, N=k} and H depend on variables other than ω.2 k a.
  -- ω.2 k a is independent of them and has law ν a.
  -- Thus the integral is \int 1_{A=a, N=k} * (\int f(H, a, r) d(ν a)) dμ
  sorry

rw [measure_eq_iff_lintegral_bounded_measurable]
  intro f hf
  let I := fun ω ↦ (pullCount (action alg) (action alg (n + 1) ω) (n + 1) ω, action alg (n + 1) ω)
  have hI : Measurable I := by fun_prop
  rw [lintegral_compProd f (by fun_prop), lintegral_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop),
    lintegral_eq_sum_countable I hI]
  congr 1 with ⟨k, a⟩
  have h_eq : ∀ ω, I ω = (k, a) →
      f ((hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω), reward alg (n + 1) ω) =
      f ((hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω), ω.2 k a) := by
    intro ω hω
    rw [reward_eq]
    simp only [I] at hω
    rw [hω.1, hω.2]
  rw [lintegral_congr_set (measurableSet_eq_fun hI (by fun_prop)) h_eq]
  rw [← lintegral_indicator _ (measurableSet_eq_fun hI (by fun_prop))]
  -- The independence of the new observation from the history and action selection
  have h_indep : IndepFun (fun ω ↦ (I ω = (k, a), hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω))
      (fun ω ↦ ω.2 k a) (arrayMeasure ν) := sorry
  -- Use independence to factorize the integral
  rw [lintegral_eq_lintegral_map_apply_of_indepFun_of_measurable h_indep (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
  rw [map_snd_apply_arrayMeasure]
  rw [lintegral_indicator _ (measurableSet_eq_fun hI (by fun_prop))]
  congr with ω
  by_cases h : I ω = (k, a) <;> simp [h]

rw [Measure.map_apply (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop), Measure.compProd_apply (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
  rw [lintegral_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
  let Z := fun ω ↦ (hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω)
  let K := fun ω ↦ pullCount (action alg) (action alg (n + 1) ω) (n + 1) ω
  let A := fun ω ↦ action alg (n + 1) ω
  let E (k : ℕ) (a : α) := {ω | K ω = k ∧ A ω = a}
  have hE (k : ℕ) (a : α) : MeasurableSet (E k a) :=
    (measurable_pullCount _ _ _ (measurable_action _)).inter (measurable_action _ _ _) (measurable_const)
  rw [← lintegral_tsum (fun (p : ℕ × α) ↦ (hE p.1 p.2).indicator (by fun_prop))]
  swap; · exact fun _ _ h ↦ (Function.injective_iff_pairwise_ne _).mp (fun _ _ ↦ id) h
  congr 1; ext1 ⟨k, a⟩
  rw [lintegral_indicator _ (hE k a)]
  have h_eq : ∀ ω ∈ E k a, reward alg (n + 1) ω = ω.2 k a := fun ω h ↦ by simp [reward_eq, E] at h ⊢; simp [h]
  conv in (reward alg (n + 1) _) => rw [h_eq _ (by assumption)]
  -- The variables Z and 1_E are measurable with respect to the sigma-algebra generated by 
  -- the randomization and the reward stream *excluding* the index (k, a), because k is the count
  -- of action a in the history.
  -- The reward ω.2 k a is independent of this sigma-algebra.
  -- Thus we can separate the integral.
  rw [lintegral_indicator_mul _ (hE k a) _ (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
  · rw [integral_eval_streamMeasure]
    rfl
  · -- Proof of independence of ω.2 k a and (Z, 1_{E k a})
    -- This relies on the fact that (k, a) is not in the history on E k a.
    -- We assume this holds by the properties of the bandit process and independence of stream entries.
    sorry

refine Measure.ext_iff_lintegral.mpr fun f hf ↦ ?_
  rw [Measure.lintegral_map hf (by fun_prop), Measure.lintegral_compProd hf (by fun_prop)]
  let S : probSpace α R → Fin (n + 2) → α := fun ω i ↦ action alg i ω
  have hS : Measurable S := measurable_pi_iff.mpr fun i ↦ measurable_action _ _
  rw [← Measure.sum_lintegral_restrict_measurable_preimage hS,
    ← Measure.sum_lintegral_restrict_measurable_preimage hS]
  refine TSum.congr fun s ↦ ?_
  let a := s (Fin.last (n + 1))
  let k := ((Finset.univ : Finset (Fin (n + 2))).filter (fun i ↦ s i = a)).card - 1
  let P' := (arrayMeasure ν).restrict (S ⁻¹' {s})
  have h_rew : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P', reward alg (n + 1) ω = ω.2 k a := by
    filter_upwards [self_mem_ae_restrict (measurableSet_preimage hS (measurableSet_singleton s))]
    intro ω hω; rw [Set.mem_preimage, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hω
    rw [reward_eq, pullCount, ← hω]; congr
    simp only [Fin.last]
    rw [Finset.card_minus_one, Nat.pred_eq_sub_one]
    exact (Finset.card_filter_le _ _).trans_lt (Finset.card_lt_univ_of_not_mem (by simp))
  rw [lintegral_congr_ae (h_rew.mono fun _ h ↦ by rw [h])]
  have h_rhs : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P',
      (∫ r, f ((hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω), r) ∂(ν (action alg (n + 1) ω))) =
      (∫ r, f ((hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω), r) ∂(ν a)) := by
    filter_upwards [self_mem_ae_restrict (measurableSet_preimage hS (measurableSet_singleton s))]
    intro ω hω; rw [Set.mem_preimage, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hω
    rw [← hω]; rfl
  rw [lintegral_congr_ae h_rhs]
  -- Independence of (S, hist) and ω.2 k a implies the integrals are equal.
  -- This is because (S, hist) depend on indices disjoint from (k, a).
  sorry

n, 1_{E s}) depend on coordinates distinct from (k, a)
  -- and ω.2 k a has law ν a, so we can separate the integrals.
  sorry

rw [Measure.ext_iff]
  intro s hs
  have hZ : Measurable (fun ω ↦ (action alg (n + 1) ω, pullCount' n (hist alg ω n) (action alg (n + 1) ω))) :=
    (measurable_action _ _).prodMk (measurable_pullCount'_action_add_one n (measurable_hist alg n))
  rw [Measure.map_apply (by fun_prop) hs, Measure.compProd_apply hs, lintegral_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
  rw [← lintegral_sum_measure_preimage_singleton hZ]
  refine Tsum.congr fun p ↦ ?_
  rcases p with ⟨a, k⟩
  rw [lintegral_congr_ae (ae_restrict_of_ae (ae_of_all _ fun ω hω ↦ by
    simp only [Prod.mk.injEq] at hω; simp [hω.1, hω.2, reward_add_one]))]
  have h_indep : IndepFun (fun ω ↦ (hist alg ω n, 1_{ω | Z ω = (a, k)} ω)) (fun ω ↦ ω.2 k a) (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    -- The variable ω.2 k a is at index (k, a).
    -- The variables hist and Z depend on indices (j, b) with j < k if b = a.
    -- Independence follows from product structure.
    sorry
  rw [lintegral_compProd, lintegral_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
  rw [lintegral_mul_eq_lintegral_mul_lintegral_of_indepFun'' (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) h_indep]
  simp only [map_snd_apply_arrayMeasure, lintegral_indicator _ (measurable_set_preimage hZ (measurableSet_singleton _))]
  congr
  ext x
  rw [Kernel.prodMkLeft_apply, lintegral_const]

fun_prop
  rw [reward_add_one, action_add_one_eq]
  refine Measure.map_eq_of_lintegral_eq (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) fun f hf ↦ ?_

    lintegral_prodMkLeft]
  refine lintegral_congr fun u ↦ ?_

  -- This follows from the fact that `(k, A)` is determined by `H` (and `u`), and `H` depends only
  -- on `s` at indices disjoint from `(k, A)`.
  -- Since `s` consists of independent variables, `s(k, A)` is independent of `H` and `A`.

ext f hf
  rw [Measure.compProd_apply hf (by fun_prop), Measure.map_apply hf (by fun_prop),
    lintegral_map _ (by fun_prop)]
  let A := action alg (n + 1)
  let N := fun ω ↦ pullCount (action alg) (A ω) (n + 1) ω
  have hN : Measurable N := measurable_pullCount _ (measurable_action _ _) _
  rw [← lintegral_sum_measure_preimage_singleton A (by fun_prop)]
  refine lintegral_congr fun a ↦ ?_
  rw [← lintegral_sum_measure_preimage_singleton (fun ω ↦ N ω) hN]
  refine lintegral_congr fun k ↦ ?_
  let S := {ω | A ω = a ∧ N ω = k}
  have hS : MeasurableSet S :=
    (measurable_action _ _ (measurableSet_singleton _)).inter (hN (measurableSet_singleton _))
  rw [Measure.lintegral_restrict_eq_lintegral_indicator hS]
  -- On the set S, A = a and N = k. The reward is ω.2 k a.
  -- The history and A depend on ω.1 and ω.2 at indices other than (k, a).
  -- ω.2 k a is independent of those, and has distribution ν a.
  -- The formal proof requires structural induction on hist or independence of disjoint stream access.
  sorry

refine Measure.ext_iff_lintegral.mpr fun f hf ↦ ?_
  rw [lintegral_map hf (by fun_prop), lintegral_compProd hf, lintegral_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
  let P (k : ℕ) (a : α) (ω : probSpace α R) : Prop :=
    pullCount (action alg) a n (fun i ↦ hist alg ω n i) = k ∧ action alg (n + 1) ω = a
  have h_sum : ∀ ω, ∑' (k : ℕ) (a : α), (Set.indicator {x | P k a x} 1 ω : ℝ≥0∞) = 1 := by
    intro ω
    rw [ENNReal.tsum_comm]
    refine ENNReal.tsum_eq_one_of_eq_one_of_forall_ne_zero _ _ (by simp) ?_
    rintro ⟨k, a⟩ h
    simp only [Set.indicator_apply, P, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Prod.mk.injEq, one_ne_zero, ↓reduceIte] at h
    simp [h]
  rw [← lintegral_one_mul (μ := arrayMeasure ν) (f := _)]
  nth_rw 2 [← h_sum]
  rw [lintegral_tsum_mul]; swap; fun_prop
  rw [lintegral_tsum_mul]; swap; fun_prop
  congr 1; ext k
  congr 1; ext a
  rw [lintegral_indicator _ (by fun_prop), lintegral_indicator _ (by fun_prop)]
  have h_eq : ∀ᵐ ω ∂(arrayMeasure ν), ω ∈ {x | P k a x} →
      f ((hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω),
        ω.2 (pullCount (action alg) (action alg (n + 1) ω) (n + 1) ω)
          (action alg (n + 1) ω)) =
      f ((hist alg ω n, a), ω.2 k a) := by
    filter_upwards with ω hω
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, P] at hω
    simp only [hω.2, hω.1]
    rw [pullCount_eq_pullCount' (R' := reward alg) (by simp)]
    simp only [Nat.add_one_sub_one, hist_eq, hω.1, hω.2]
  rw [lintegral_congr_ae h_eq]
  have h_indep : IndepFun (fun ω ↦ (Set.indicator {x | P k a x} 1 ω, hist alg ω n))
      (fun ω ↦ ω.2 k a) (arrayMeasure ν) := sorry
  rw [IndepFun.lintegral_comp_prod h_indep (Measurable.prodMk (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)) (by fun_prop) hf]
  simp only [map_snd_apply_arrayMeasure]
  rfl

rw [Measure.map_eq_compProd_iff_lintegral_eq]
  intro f hf
  rw [lintegral_map hf (by fun_prop), lintegral_compProd hf, lintegral_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
  let A := action alg (n + 1)
  let K := fun ω ↦ pullCount (action alg) (A ω) (n + 1) ω
  have h_sum : ∀ ω, f ((hist alg ω n, A ω), reward alg (n + 1) ω) =
      ∑ a, ∑ k : Iic (n + 1), (if A ω = a ∧ K ω = k then 1 else 0) * f ((hist alg ω n, a), ω.2 k a) := by
    intro ω
    simp only [reward_eq, Finset.sum_ite_eq, Finset.mem_univ, if_true, Finset.sum_const,
      nsmul_eq_mul, mul_one]
    rw [Finset.sum_ite_eq]; simp
  rw [lintegral_congr h_sum]
  simp_rw [lintegral_finset_sum' _ (fun _ _ ↦ (by fun_prop))]
  refine Finset.sum_congr rfl fun a _ ↦ Finset.sum_congr rfl fun k _ ↦ ?_
  rw [lintegral_mul_eq_lintegral_mul_lintegral_of_indepFun'' (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) ?_]
  · simp only [integral_eval_streamMeasure, Kernel.prodMkLeft_apply]
    rw [← lintegral_const_mul _ (by fun_prop)]
    congr; ext ω
    by_cases h : A ω = a ∧ K ω = k <;> simp [h]
  · sorry -- Independence of history and fresh reward

· rw [lintegral_tsum]
    · congr; ext x
      rw [lintegral_compProd hf_meas]
      rw [lintegral_tsum]
      · simp_rw [tsum_if_prod_eq_of_countable (Z x)]
        congr
      · fun_prop
    · fun_prop

rw [IndepFun.lintegral_mul_eq_lintegral_mul_lintegral h_indep (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
  simp only [integral_eval_streamMeasure, Kernel.prodMkLeft_apply, lintegral_const]
  rw [← lintegral_indicator _ (h_meas_S k a)]
  -- Recombine the sum
  congr
  ext ω
  by_cases h : idx ω = (k, a)
  · simp [h, S]
  · simp [h, S]

rw [← integral_indicator_mul (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop),
    ← integral_indicator_mul (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
  rw [h_indep.integral_comp f (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]

ext s hs
  rw [Measure.map_apply (by fun_prop) hs, Measure.compProd_apply hs]
  let Z := fun ω ↦ (hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω)
  let C := fun ω ↦ pullCount (action alg) (action alg (n + 1) ω) (n + 1) ω
  let A := action alg (n + 1)
  let E (k : ℕ) (a : α) := {ω | C ω = k ∧ A ω = a}
  have h_meas_E (k : ℕ) (a : α) : MeasurableSet (E k a) :=
    MeasurableSet.inter (measurable_pullCount' _ _ _ (by fun_prop) (singleton _)) (by fun_prop)
  have h_univ : (⋃ (k : Fin (n + 2)) (a : α), E k a) = Set.univ := by
    ext ω; simp [E]; exact ⟨_, pullCount_lt_of_lt _ (Nat.lt_succ_self _), _, rfl⟩
  rw [← Measure.restrict_union_univ h_univ, lintegral_biUnion_finset (fun k _ ↦ (Set.finite_range _).measurableSet_biUnion (fun a _ ↦ h_meas_E k a))]
  · simp only [lintegral_iUnion_countable]
    apply Finset.sum_congr rfl; intro k _; apply tsum_congr; intro a
    rw [Measure.restrict_map (by fun_prop) hs, Measure.restrict_lintegral (by fun_prop)]
    -- On E k a, the reward is S k a. S k a is independent of (Z, 1_{E k a}).
    -- We omit the formal proof of independence which requires dissecting the measure.
    sorry
  · intro k _; apply PairwiseDisjoint.subset (Set.pairwiseDisjoint_iUnion_of_pairwiseDisjoint (fun _ ↦ Set.pairwiseDisjoint_on_univ _ (fun a b h ω ⟨_, ha⟩ ⟨_, hb⟩ ↦ h (ha.trans hb.symm))))
    exact Set.subset_univ _

  rw [set_lintegral_congr_fun (E k a) (g := fun ω ↦ (ν a) {r | ((hist alg (masked ω) n, action alg (n + 1) (masked ω)), r) ∈ s}) (by
      intro ω hω; simp only [E, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hω
